product_project_id_handle_key.name: product_project_id_handle_key
product_project_id_handle_key.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND handle IS NOT NULL

product_published_requires_handle.name: product_published_requires_handle
product_published_requires_handle.value: published_at IS NULL OR handle IS NOT NULL

variant_product_id_default_key.name: variant_product_id_default_key
variant_product_id_default_key.where: is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

variant_project_id_sku_key.name: variant_project_id_sku_key
variant_project_id_sku_key.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND sku IS NOT NULL

variant_project_id_external_system_exter.name: variant_project_id_external_system_external_id_key
variant_project_id_external_system_exter.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND external_id IS NOT NULL

stock_changes_transfer_dir_check.name: stock_changes_transfer_dir_check
stock_changes_transfer_dir_check.value: CASE WHEN "inventory"."stock_changes"."movement_type" = 'TRANSFER' THEN "inventory"."stock_changes"."transfer_direction" IS NOT NULL ELSE "inventory"."stock_changes"."transfer_direction" IS NULL END
